items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md) that adds additional `x-callback-url` endpoints to the app for common actions — it's a clean, super-charged addition to Obsidian URI.

items.content_html: This repository is a package with functions faciltating the display of plots, figures, tables, dataframes and such with the Execute Code plugin of Obsidian.

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that displays all open notes in a tab group as if they were a single continuous document (sometimes called "Scrivenings mode"). Features arrow navigation between notes, reorder notes with drag-and-drop of tab headers.
items.title: gasparschott/obsidian-continuous-mode: An Obsidian plugin that displays all open notes in a tab group as if they were a single continuous document (sometimes called "Scrivenings mode"). Features arrow navigation between notes, reorder notes with drag-and-drop of tab headers.
